arts.ttl: Leeds United precedent could see axe falling on a new attacker vs Middlesbrough
arts.sum: The right-back has not missed any matches through injury this season, but seems more likely to be absent than start Tuesday’s game, in Farke’s opinion. Daniel Farke's team hosts a Michael Carrick side with only one defeat in their last six matches, but four wins in that time and an impressive 19 goals scored.

arts.ttl: Michael Carrick makes Middlesbrough promotion admission but won't change mentality in the race
arts.sum: We’ve been building for some time now to keep striving to be towards the top of the table and challenging, and that comes through performances that the boys can get confidence from. Having proved their credentials further on Friday with a draw at fellow candidates Burnley, Carrick admits there’s a natural sense of belief, but continued to call for the right mentality from his players, having spent much of his playing career chasing success from season to season and knowing exactly what that takes.

arts.ttl: Mateusz Klich gearing up for new emotional transfer two years on from Leeds United exit
arts.sum: The option to extend his deal to 2025 remains for DC, but reports from Meczyki share that talks are underway for the midfielder to return to Cracovia in Poland, the club where his senior career began. Leeds United have been without Mateusz Klich in their squad for the past two years since January 2023, but the former favourite’s happenings are always a talking point amongst fans.

arts.ttl: Is Leeds United vs Middlesbrough on TV? Kick-off time, live stream details and how to follow
arts.sum: Yes, it is the headline Championship match to be screened on the Sky Sports Football channel. Wales international Joe Rodon and Max Wober bagged their first goals for the club to help Daniel Farke's troops return to winning ways.

arts.ttl: Leeds United squad revealed for Middlesbrough as Daniel Farke makes Jayden Bogle decision
arts.sum: Daniel Farke has reminded his Leeds United players that only their best will be good enough against in-form Middlesbrough. But Boro arrive in West Yorkshire on the back of four wins from their past six matches.

arts.ttl: Tuesday's Championship predictions including Leeds vs. Middlesbrough
arts.sum: Sports Mole provides score predictions and previews for all of today's Championship fixtures, including Leeds United vs. Middlesbrough.

arts.ttl: Michael Carrick’s stance on Ben Doak’s Middlesbrough loan ahead of Liverpool recall decision
arts.sum: After Doak told Sky Sports on Friday evening why he felt Boro was the right place for him at this moment, Carrick said when asked of Liverpool's recall clause: “I’m quite calm about it to be honest. Michael Carrick insists he is relaxed about Ben Doak's Middlesbrough situation heading into the January transfer window, where parent club Liverpool have a recall clause.

arts.ttl: Latte Lath over Piroe, Tanaka in: Leeds United and Middlesbrough combined XI
arts.sum: Leeds United welcome Middlesbrough to Elland Road for one of their toughest home fixtures of the season thus far, aiming to reclaim top spot in the process. Leeds United v Middlesbrough: Combined XI

arts.ttl: Leeds United forward Wilfried Gnonto jokes about Championship promotion battle after new twist
arts.sum: Leeds United winger Wilfried Gnonto is enjoying the Championship promotion battle - but wishes his side were 15 points clear at the top. We know we are a really good team as well and we were really close last year and we are looking for a different ending this season."

arts.ttl: Leeds United man’s preference revealed amid swathes of January interest
arts.sum: Leeds United forward Joe Gelhardt is said to be eager to join Rangers during the January window, amid reported interest from the Glasgow club. A loan exit is expected to be what awaits Gelhardt in the new year, with these clubs still keen on signing the 22-year-old – who has featured for just 72 minutes this season, nine of those in the league.
